display.purpose: Page headings, section titles. Once per major surface.

headline.purpose: Card section headers, sidebar brand mark.

title.purpose: Component labels, nav item text, list item names.

body.purpose: Supporting copy, descriptions. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: Token symbols, uppercase metadata, status chip text. Geist Mono.

amount.purpose: Balance figures, rates, all financial quantities. Geist Mono + tabular-nums. Absolute — no exceptions.

shadows.name: agent-glow
shadows.purpose: Active agent status dot only. The single glow in the system — appears only when the agent is running. Do not apply elsewhere.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.value: { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 8 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, transition: { duration: 0.25, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] } }
motion.purpose: Card and stat entrance. Communicates that data has arrived; not decoration.

motion.name: stagger-children
motion.purpose: Balance grid stagger. 60ms between children — fast enough to feel live, slow enough to read as sequence.

motion.name: scale-in
motion.value: { initial: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.97 }, animate: { opacity: 1, scale: 1 }, transition: { duration: 0.2 } }
motion.purpose: Modal and success state entrance. Slightly tighter than fade-up.

motion.name: success-spring
motion.value: { initial: { scale: 0 }, animate: { scale: 1 }, transition: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 20, delay: 0.1 } }
motion.purpose: Swap confirmed icon only. The one spring animation in the system — bounded by success state.

motion.name: reduced-motion-fallback
motion.purpose: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) replacement for all above animations.

breakpoints.name: minipay
breakpoints.purpose: Opera MiniPay minimum viewport. Primary mobile target, not a degraded fallback.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar becomes visible; layout shifts from single-column to sidebar + content.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action on any screen. Confirm swap, activate agent, submit form.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #35D07F; color: #09090B; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; height: 40px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #2EBA70; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #35D07F; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary or back action. Appears alongside Primary in two-button rows.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: transparent; color: #FAFAFA; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #212121; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; height: 40px; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #121212; border-color: #333333; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #35D07F; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Balance Card
components.description: Displays a single stablecoin balance. Stagger-animated in a responsive grid on the dashboard.
components.css: .ds-balance-card { background-color: #121212; border: 1px solid #212121; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-balance-card:hover { border-color: #333333; background-color: rgba(23,23,23,0.9); } .ds-balance-card__header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-balance-card__token { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-balance-card__flag { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1; } .ds-balance-card__symbol { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #5FDE9A; } .ds-balance-card__amount { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #FAFAFA; } .ds-balance-card__usd { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #999999; margin-top: 4px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Agent Status
components.description: Active/paused agent indicator with live glow. The only element in the system that uses a glow shadow.
components.css: .ds-agent-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-agent-status__dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: #525252; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-agent-status--active .ds-agent-status__dot { background-color: #35D07F; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #35D07F; } .ds-agent-status__label { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #FAFAFA; } .ds-agent-status__badge { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-agent-status--active .ds-agent-status__badge { color: #35D07F; background-color: rgba(53, 208, 127, 0.10); } .ds-agent-status:not(.ds-agent-status--active) .ds-agent-status__badge { color: #999999; background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid #212121; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Navigation item in the left sidebar. Active state shows Harmattan Green icon and pip.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #999999; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; position: relative; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background-color: #121212; color: #FAFAFA; } .ds-nav-item--active { background-color: #121212; color: #FAFAFA; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item__icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; color: inherit; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-item__icon { color: #35D07F; } .ds-nav-item__pip { display: none; width: 4px; height: 16px; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #35D07F; margin-left: auto; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-item__pip { display: block; }

components.name: Swap Tab Selector
components.description: Currency pair selector at the top of the swap card. Active tab uses 2px bottom border, not a filled background.
components.css: .ds-swap-tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #212121; } .ds-swap-tab { flex: 1; padding: 10px 0; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #999999; background-color: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-swap-tab:hover { color: #FAFAFA; } .ds-swap-tab--active { color: #35D07F; background-color: rgba(53, 208, 127, 0.10); border-bottom-color: #35D07F; }

components.name: Data Row List
components.description: Confirmation and detail display. Muted label on the left, Mono value on the right. Used in swap confirm and agent config.
components.html:
You send1.00 USDm
You receive~1,620.00 NGNm
RouteMento Protocol
GasPaid in USDC
components.css: .ds-data-list { border: 1px solid #212121; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-data-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #212121; } .ds-data-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-data-row__label { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #999999; } .ds-data-row__value { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #FAFAFA; text-align: right; }

components.name: Amount Input Field
components.description: Borderless amount entry within a tonal container. No visible focus ring on the field itself — the container defines the boundary.
components.html: You sendUSDm
components.css: .ds-amount-field { background-color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #212121; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-amount-field__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-amount-field__label { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #999999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-amount-field__badge { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #35D07F; background-color: rgba(53, 208, 127, 0.10); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-amount-field__input { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #FAFAFA; -moz-appearance: textfield; } .ds-amount-field__input::-webkit-outer-spin-button, .ds-amount-field__input::-webkit-inner-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; } .ds-amount-field__input::placeholder { color: rgba(250, 250, 250, 0.2); }

narrative.overview:
The CeloVault interface is the Night Watchman's activity log. The agent operates while the user sleeps — scanning rates every 60 seconds, executing swaps the moment a threshold is crossed, logging every transaction to the Celo blockchain. The dashboard does not offer controls because the agent does not need supervision. It offers a precise, timestamped record of what happened, what is being watched, and what will happen when the next threshold is crossed.

Every design decision descends from this premise. The surface is near-black (#0A0A0A) because a vigilant tool does not advertise itself. Monospace numerals carry the weight of every balance, rate, address, and countdown. Color appears only when the agent has acted or a threshold has meaning: Harmattan Green for confirmation and live activity, Market Gold for rate emphasis and threshold proximity.

This system explicitly rejects four aesthetic families: the purple-gradient DeFi aesthetic (glassmorphic panels, neon accents, glowing orbs not earned by state); the Revolut/Wise western neobank look (corporate blue, productivity-optimism, white backgrounds built for London); the SaaS metrics dashboard (navy plus orange, hero-metric template, identical card grids); and the crypto exchange (candlestick density, orderbook panels, trading terminal chrome).
keyCharacteristics: Three-layer tonal depth (Void Black → Surface → Nested Surface) without shadows
Geist Sans for everything human-authored; Geist Mono for every financial figure, address, and hash
Harmattan Green as a signal color: reserved for confirmed agent actions, active states, and primary CTAs
Market Gold for rate threshold emphasis and secondary data highlights
Terminal-adjacent interaction: borderless inputs inside tonal containers, flat buttons, tint-shift hover states
The single glow (0 0 6px #35D07F) appears only on the active agent status dot — earned by state, never decorative

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Harmattan Green and Market Gold appear only in response to data or agent state — not as background decoration, brand color on static chrome, or gradient components. If a screen has no confirmed action and no active threshold, neither color appears on it.

rules.name: The One-Nesting Rule
rules.body: Surface tones stack at most two levels: Surface (#121212) containing Nested Surface (#1A1A1A). A third nested level is a layout problem, not a color problem.

rules.name: The Mono Gate Rule
rules.body: If a string was generated by arithmetic or read from onchain state — balance, rate, fee, tx hash, countdown timer, block number, address — it renders in Geist Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. No exceptions. Human-authored copy renders in Geist Sans.

rules.name: The Scale Economy Rule
rules.body: Four type sizes in active use: 24px (amount), 18px (headline), 14px (body/title), 12px (label). Do not introduce intermediate sizes to resolve spacing problems. Solve layout in the layout.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: At rest, every surface is flat. Depth is established through tone alone. If a component appears to need a drop shadow for visual separation, the layout needs restructuring, not a new shadow.

rules.name: The Single Glow Rule
rules.body: box-shadow: 0 0 6px #35D07F appears only on the active agent status dot. Do not apply glow to buttons, cards, inputs, tabs, or navigation elements. Its scarcity makes it instantly legible as a live-agent signal.

rules.name: The Two-Level Rule
rules.body: Cards contain Inner Containers. Inner Containers contain data. Nothing nests deeper.

rules.name: The 2px Bottom Border Rule
rules.body: Active tab state is communicated by a 2px border-bottom at Harmattan Green. The tint background is secondary context. Never use a filled Harmattan Green background for tab active state.

dos: Do use Harmattan Green (#35D07F) only on confirmed states, active agent indicators, and primary CTAs. Every additional use dilutes its signal value.
Do render every financial figure — balances, rates, fees, tx hashes, addresses, countdowns — in Geist Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. The Mono Gate Rule is absolute.
Do use three surface tones (Void Black → Surface → Nested Surface) for visual hierarchy before considering any other approach.
Do keep placeholder text in Muted (#999999) and verify it exceeds 4.5:1 on its parent surface.
Do write all button labels as verb + object: 'Review Swap', 'Confirm Swap', 'Activate agent'.
Do show Market Gold (#FBCC5C) on rate values when a threshold is approached or active.
Do treat the MiniPay mobile viewport (360px minimum) as the primary responsive target.
Do wrap card and stat entrances in Framer Motion fadeUp (0.25s, [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] easing).
Do provide @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for all Framer Motion animations.
donts: Don't use purple gradients, neon accents (other than Harmattan Green in state contexts), or glassmorphic panels.
Don't apply the Revolut or Wise visual language: corporate blue, white or light backgrounds, soft color pops on a light surface.
Don't build a hero-metric card (big number, small label, gradient accent, supporting stats row). The agent's swap count is data, not a hero.
Don't render crypto exchange UI: candlestick charts, orderbook depth panels, red/green trading terminal density.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Emphasis is weight or size; never gradient.
Don't nest more than two surface levels. Card → Inner Container is the limit.
Don't replicate box-shadow: 0 0 6px #35D07F on anything except the active agent status dot.
Don't build identical card grids without distinct per-item identity.
Don't introduce colors outside the defined palette without updating DESIGN.md.
Don't add all-caps body copy or uppercase running prose. Uppercase is reserved for Label-role tokens only.
